title: Die Hard
verdict: A Christmas movie by any meaningful definition — and one of the greatest action films ever made.

faqs.q: Is Die Hard a Christmas movie?
faqs.a: Yes. According to Tis the Podcast, Die Hard qualifies as a Christmas movie. Set entirely on Christmas Eve with themes of family reunion and redemption, and closing with 'Let It Snow,' the film earns its place in the Christmas canon.

faqs.q: Where does Die Hard rank on the Tis the Podcast Watch List?
faqs.a: Listen to the full episode to hear where Die Hard lands on the Tis the Podcast canonical Christmas movie ranking.

faqs.q: What do the hosts of Tis the Podcast think of Die Hard?
faqs.a: All three elves — Anthony Caruso, Julia Colburn, and Thom Crowe — debated Die Hard's Christmas credentials. Listen to the full episode for their verdict.

title: Elf
verdict: The consensus greatest Christmas movie of the modern era — all three elves agree.

faqs.a: Absolutely yes. Elf (2003) is one of the most unambiguous Christmas movies ever made — a modern holiday classic reviewed and celebrated on Tis the Podcast.

faqs.q: Where does Elf rank on the Tis the Podcast Watch List?
faqs.a: Elf is one of the highest-rated films on the Tis the Podcast canonical Christmas movie Watch List. See the full ranking at tisthepodcast.com/the-watch-list.
Elf was directed by Jon Favreau and stars Will Ferrell as Buddy the Elf, alongside James Caan, Mary Steenburgen, and Zooey Deschanel.

title: Home Alone
verdict: A perfect Christmas film that somehow gets better every rewatch.

faqs.q: Is Home Alone a Christmas movie?
faqs.a: Yes, definitively. Home Alone (1990) is one of the most beloved Christmas movies of all time — a holiday staple reviewed and ranked on Tis the Podcast.

faqs.q: Where does Home Alone rank on the Tis the Podcast Watch List?
faqs.a: Home Alone is one of the top-ranked films on the Tis the Podcast canonical Christmas movie Watch List. See the full ranking at tisthepodcast.com/the-watch-list.

faqs.q: Is Love Actually a Christmas movie?
faqs.a: Love Actually is one of the most debated Christmas films — is it a Christmas movie or a romance that happens to be set at Christmas? The Tis the Podcast elves weighed in. Listen to the full episode for the verdict.

faqs.q: Is Iron Man 3 a Christmas movie?
faqs.a: Iron Man 3 is set during Christmas and directed by Shane Black, who famously sets all his films at Christmas. Whether that makes it a Christmas movie is hotly debated — Tis the Podcast weighed in on the full episode.

faqs.q: Is Lethal Weapon a Christmas movie?
faqs.a: Lethal Weapon (1987) is set during Christmas and features holiday imagery throughout, but its action-thriller genre makes it a classic Christmas movie debate. Tis the Podcast covered it in full.

faqs.q: Is A Christmas Story a Christmas movie?
faqs.a: Yes — A Christmas Story (1983) is a genuine holiday classic and one of the most-watched Christmas films of all time. Tis the Podcast reviewed it in full.
